title: CodeGrind evolves: AI assistant upgrades and Code Breach visuals collide with learning
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's upgraded AI assistant capabilities alongside the cyberpunk Code Breach visuals to highlight integrated learning, problem-solving help, and immersive gameplay.
core_message: CodeGrind now blends Azure OpenAI-powered AI guidance with a visually redesigned Code Breach tower-defense world, reinforcing hands-on learning, real-time feedback, and engaging problem-solving in one platform.
cta: Try the updated CodeGrind now: sign in to experience AI-assisted problem solving and the refreshed Code Breach visuals.
visual_brief: Static hero-style image featuring the redesigned Code Breach cyberpunk aesthetic on one side, with a subtle overlay of AI chat guidance UI and sample problem prompts, in CodeGrind branding colors. Include a captioned banner reading 'AI-assisted learning meets cyberpunk gameplay.'

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
